name: Scotland Yard
description: Scotland Yard is the original asymmetric chase game — one player is the elusive Mr. X, slipping through London by taxi, bus, and underground while the rest are detectives hunting him down. Mr. X writes his moves in a hidden log, surfacing only at a few scheduled "X" rounds; the detectives must triangulate from leaked transport modes. Spiel des Jahres 1983, still gripping.
